fde.title: 印度试点AI智能体主导的电商，融合ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude
fde.useCase: AI chatbot-led e-commerce with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude in the mix
deliveryComponents: On Thursday, the National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), the federal body behind the country’s widely used Unified Payments Interface (UPI), partnered with OpenAI and fintech firm Razorpay to enable consumers to shop and pay directly through ChatGPT. Razorpay confirmed to TechCrunch that the pilot is being rolled out nationwide and will become widely available in the coming months.
